name: Soy Yogurt (Sweetened)

pros.title: strong fibre-forward category identity
pros.explanation: That is a big part of why legumes rank well so often.

pros.title: cheap way to buy real nutrition
pros.explanation: The affordability piece matters in real diets.

pros.title: usually filling for the calories
pros.explanation: Legumes often do several jobs at once.

cons.title: sweetened diluted format loses a lot of the category payoff
cons.explanation: The legume identity is still there, but only weakly.

cons.title: can be rough on digestion for some people
cons.explanation: Tolerance still matters in the real world.

cons.title: prep can be a barrier
cons.explanation: The category is strong, but not always frictionless.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
